perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black vest over a white puffed-sleeve shirt stands in a Costco warehouse, holding a pre-packaged 'XO Sauce Stir-fry Radish Cake' kit. (2) Close-up shots of the product label and its contents, including radish cake slices, eggs, and vegetables; a hand is placed over the cake to demonstrate its size. (3) Transition to a kitchen setting where the woman fries the radish cake slices in a pan until golden brown, then adds vegetables and sauce, tossing them together. (4) Two women are shown seated at a table, eating the prepared dish with chopsticks, nodding, and gesturing enthusiastically. (5) Final shots show the women discussing the food's texture and flavor while continuing to eat.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop background music begins. A high-pitched, energetic female voice introduces a new Costco find. (2) The music continues as the same female voice narrates the price and components of the meal kit. (3) Crisp sizzling sounds of food frying in a pan are heard, layered over the music. (4) Two female voices engage in a conversational dialogue, expressing satisfaction through 'ooh' and 'ahh' sounds, while describing the 'wok-hei' (breath of the wok) and the softness of the cake. (5) The music remains consistent until the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top. (2) Functional subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (3) Decorative text: '自己炒蘿蔔糕啦' (Fry your own radish cake) in yellow/blue bubbles. (4) '味道超爆炸' (Explosive taste) and 'XO醬炒蘿蔔糕' (XO Sauce Stir-fry Radish Cake) appear as hooks. (5) '鍋氣跟香氣' (Wok-hei and aroma) appears in colorful variety-show style font during the tasting segment.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Cooking demonstration at home -> Tasting and review session

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 child passerby in the store background, 1 adult passerby in the store background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black vest over a white shirt; the second woman wears a black and white striped top and a dark beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The store background features typical warehouse shelving and refrigerated units; the kitchen background features a modern stove, pans, and a dining table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Preparation Demo -> Final Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video acts as a consumer recommendation for a DIY food kit found at Costco. It combines the 'unboxing' excitement of a new product with a practical tutorial on how to cook it, concluding with a subjective taste test to validate the purchase for the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of brand packaging and specific praise for the product's flavor and value.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions with glowing borders and high-energy opening hook.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious foodies and Costco fans in the Taiwanese market, emphasizing the 'value' and 'ease of cooking' at home.
